name: generate_student_id_cards
script:
batch = frappe.get_doc("Student ID Card Batch", frappe.form_dict.batch)

# Update Batch Status
batch.status = "In Progress"

created = 0
skipped = 0

for row in batch.students:

    # Skip if already generated
    if row.card_generated:
        skipped += 1
        continue

    # Check whether Student ID Card already exists
    existing_card = frappe.db.exists(
        "Student ID Card",
        {
            "student": row.student,
            "academic_year": batch.academic_year
        }
    )

    if existing_card:
        row.card_generated = 1
        row.student_id_card = existing_card
        row.generated_on = frappe.utils.now_datetime()
        skipped += 1
        continue

    # Fetch Student Details
    student = frappe.get_doc("Custom Student", row.student)

    # Create Student ID Card
    card = frappe.new_doc("Student ID Card")

    card.student = student.name
    card.student_name = student.student_name
    card.academic_year = student.current_academic_year
    card.program = student.current_program
    card.roll_no = student.roll_no
    card.blood_group = student.blood_group
    card.mobile = student.student_mobile_number
    card.photo = student.image
    card.template = batch.template
    card.status = "Draft"

    # Save Student ID Card
    card.insert(ignore_permissions=True)

    # Update Batch Item
    row.card_generated = 1
    row.student_id_card = card.name
    row.generated_on = frappe.utils.now_datetime()

    created += 1

# Update Batch Status
batch.status = "Completed"

# Save Batch
batch.save(ignore_permissions=True)

frappe.response["message"] = (
    str(created)
    + " Student ID Card(s) generated successfully. "
    + str(skipped)
    + " Student(s) skipped because an ID Card already exists."
)
